title: Tool registry v0.1
description: Signed registry of allowed tools: tool_id, publisher, version, integrity hash, capabilities, risk class. Agent may only call tools that exist in this registry with pinned versions and declared capabilities.

tool_id.description: Stable identifier for the tool (e.g. read_lims_v1).

sha256.description: SHA-256 of tool artifact or manifest (optional integrity check).

wheel_hash.description: Hash of wheel or distributable (alternative to sha256).

capabilities.description: Declared capabilities (e.g. read_lims, write_lims, actuate_device, net_access).

arg_schema_ref.description: Reference to JSON schema for tool arguments (e.g. policy/schemas/tool_foo.v0.1.schema.json).

risk_class.description: Risk class for gating and SBOM scans.

signing_key_id.description: Key ID that signed this registry entry or artifact (when strict_signatures).
